speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , does this bus go to the new bookstore ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , you'll have to get off at the bank , and take a No . 50 .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you.How much is the fare to that stop ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Could you please tell me when we get there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: By the way , do I need a transfer again after No . 50 ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , a No . 50 will take you right there .
